launch:
<executable <<<<<<< HEAD cmd='bash -c "unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.person_follow_node"' ======= cmd="bash" args="-lc "$HOME/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/src/topological_nav/scripts/ros_launch_node.sh $ROBOT $HOME/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.person_follow_node"" >>>>>>> bca1a1a1bd3c6664ad27a6c5b94dc6b751a718b3 output="screen"/>
